subject: Disable HTTP Port of portal-app
commit_message:
Disable HTTP Port of portal-app

Issue-ID: PORTAL-848
Change-Id: I59fc05e2af2ff9429046497bd841d7ae8d0c58e8
Signed-off-by: statta <statta@research.att.com>

entries.message:
